rulings.Case Title: SHERIDAN VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: D/C DISTRIBUTION - DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. NO SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF OUGHT TO HAVE HAD KNOWLEDGE RE COMPOSITION OF DEFENDANT'S (HEIECK & MORAN) PRODUCTS. See Villa v. McFerren, (1995) 35 Cal.App.4th 733; Hagen v. Hickenbottom, (1995) 41 Cal.App.4th 168. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHERIDAN VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: FDCC - DENY, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. ADDITIONALLY, COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION BASED UPON EVIDENCE 1290 ET SEQ. See Law Revision Commission Comment to Evid. 1290 & N.N.V. v. Association of Blood Banks, (1999) 75 Cal.App.4th 1358, 1395. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHERIDAN VS A.P. GREEN INDUSTRIES, INC.
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN. RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID. NO QUESTIONS BY DEFENDANT OF PLAINTIFF AT DEPOSITION RE SYNKOLOID PRODUCTS. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: TAMBURO VS LIPARI
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion Confirmation Of Partition Accounting & Appaisal & Rendering Of A Final Decision On Pltf'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO CONFIRM ACCOUNTING & APPRAISAL GRANTED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MUT INVESTMENT INCORPORATED VS GLASS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Amendment Complaint.
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO FILE AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DENIED FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. IN ADDITION THERE IS INSUFFICIENT TIME BEFORE TRIAL OF MAY 13 TO PERMIT THIS AMENDMENT. (CW)
